sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْمَنْسَفُ الطَّبَقَ الْوَطَنِيَّ فِي الْأُرْدُنِ، وَهُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلْأَصَالَةِ وَالتُّرَاثِ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الشَّامِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se smatra nacionalnim jelom u Jordanu i simbol je autentičnosti i naslijeđa u levantskoj kuhinji.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is considered the national dish of Jordan and is a symbol of authenticity and heritage in Levantine cuisine.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنْ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الطَّرِيِّ الْمَطْبُوخِ فِي صَلْصَةٍ فَرِيدَةٍ مِنَ اللَّبَنِ الْمُجَفَّفِ الْمَعْرُوفِ بِالْجَمِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od mekane janjetine kuhane u jedinstvenom sosu od sušenog jogurta poznatog kao 'jameed'.
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of tender lamb cooked in a unique sauce made from dried yogurt known as 'jameed'.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ اللَّحْمُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرُزِّ الْأَصْفَرِ وَخُبْزِ الشِّرَاكِ الرَّقِيقِ، ثُمَّ يُزَيَّنُ بِالْمُكَسَّرَاتِ الْمُحَمَّصَةِ.
sentences.translation: Meso se poslužuje preko velikog sloja žute riže i tankog 'shrak' hljeba, a zatim se ukrašava prženim orašastim plodovima.
sentences.translationEn: The meat is served over a large bed of yellow rice and thin 'shrak' bread, then garnished with toasted nuts.

sentences.arabic: مَا يُمَيِّزُ الْمَنْسَفَ هُوَ النَّكْهَةُ الْقَوِيَّةُ لِلْجَمِيدِ الَّتِي تَتَطَلَّبُ مَهَارَةً عَالِيَةً فِي التَّحْضِيرِ لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى الْقَوَامِ الْمِثَالِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ono što izdvaja Mansaf jeste jak ukus jameeda, koji zahtijeva veliku vještinu u pripremi kako bi se postigla savršena konzistencija.
sentences.translationEn: What distinguishes Mansaf is the strong flavor of the jameed, which requires high skill in preparation to reach the perfect consistency.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ النَّاسُ حَوْلَ صِينِيَّةِ الْمَنْسَفِ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْكُبْرَى لِتَنَاوُلِهِ بِالْأَيْدِي، مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ رُوحَ الْمَشَارَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se okupljaju oko tepsije Mansafa u velikim prilikama kako bi jeli rukama, što jača duh zajedništva.
sentences.translationEn: People gather around the Mansaf tray on major occasions to eat it with their hands, which reinforces the spirit of sharing.
